_comment: THIS IS A PLACEHOLDER FILE — NOT A REAL ELEMENTOR TEMPLATE.
instructions: 1. Build your homepage in Elementor (Pages → Home → Edit with Elementor).
2. When done, go to: Elementor → My Templates (or use the Export Template option inside Elementor).
3. Export your Home template as a JSON file.
4. Replace THIS file (demo-data/elementor/home-template.json) with your exported JSON.
5. The demo import will then automatically apply the Elementor design to the Home page.
title: NexaThemes Home — Placeholder
